global_visual_rules.style_direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first

cover_image.purpose: Compress the article's main idea into one visual system that is understandable in one glance.
cover_image.concept_summary: Mamba-3 这次最关键的变化，不是再讲训练提速，而是把注意力从“怎么更快预训练”转向“怎么在不加推理延迟的前提下，把质量继续往上推”。
key_relationships: present one question and one promise
make the article worth clicking in one glance
cover_image.prompt_seed: Make this a hook-first cover. One question or tension, one promise, not a dense summary. Source context: Gorden_Sun

inline_images.purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block.
inline_images.concept_summary: 如果你还在把模型架构升级理解成一场参数和 benchmark 的军备竞赛，那 Mamba-3 这篇博客真正想纠正的，可能正是这种看法。它不是在说“我们又做了个更强版本”，而是在说：当后训练、RL rollout、agent workflow 都开始把推理压力推到天花板附近，架构…
inline_images.placement_rule: Insert near the start of framing to reset attention at this section transition.
key_relationships: make the before/after or old/new contrast obvious
show why one example proves the point

inline_images.purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block.
inline_images.concept_summary: Mamba-2 当年押注的是训练效率，所以通过大量简化底层状态空间机制，换来了 2 到 8 倍的训练提速。但今天的瓶颈已经不只在预训练。部署、后训练、强化学习 rollout，以及 Codex、Claude Code 这类 agent workflow，都把“推理是不是够便宜、…
inline_images.placement_rule: Insert near the start of section_02 to reset attention at this section transition.

inline_images.purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block.
inline_images.concept_summary: Mamba-3 的核心价值，不是继续从训练优先的角度调旧结构，而是反过来问：如果今天真正昂贵的是推理，那一个为推理而设计的状态空间模型应该长什么样？博客里给出的结论也很清楚：固定状态带来了线性复杂度，但也要求模型把更多过去信息压缩进同一个表示里。问题不在于谁更高级，而在于当推理…

on_canvas_text.headline: 反过来问：如果今天真正…

visual_constraints: maintain same house style as cover
inline_images.prompt_seed: Use the example_comparison grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 这篇博客最有价值的，是把架构取舍讲明白了

inline_images.purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block.
inline_images.concept_summary: 过去一段时间，很多架构讨论默认把“训练更省”当成第一目标；但当后训练和 agent usage 爆炸式增长之后，质量和推理效率之间的边界开始变得更重要。你不只是想让模型更会做题，你还想让它在真实推理账单面前依然成立。Mamba-3 其实是在回应这个更现实的问题。
inline_images.placement_rule: Insert near the start of section_04 to reset attention at this section transition.
